gdpr-art-12-13.requirements: The organization defines and documents a process to inform users with a Privacy Notice for collecting and processing their personal data.

gdpr-art-13-14.requirements: The organization timely notifies users about any changes to personal data processing.

gdpr-art-7-12.requirements: The organization displays a cookie consent banner for users to accept or decline the cookie policy.

gdpr-art-7-banner.requirements: The organization obtains consent from data subjects for processing activities where consent is the legal basis.

gdpr-art-7-consent-obtain.requirements: The organization maintains records of consent given by data subjects.

gdpr-art-7-consent-record.requirements: The organization allows data subjects to withdraw their consent.

gdpr-art-8-consent-obtain-withdrawal.requirements: The organization collects user data after receiving their consent.

gdpr-art-8-parental-consent.requirements: The organization collects data after obtaining verifiable parental consent for the processing of personal data of children below the legal age.

gdpr-art-30-personal-data-inventory.requirements: The organization has developed and maintains Personal Data Inventories for all processing activities.

gdpr-art-5-purpose-limitation.requirements: Personal data attributes processed by the organization are minimized to what is required for fulfilling the stated purpose.

gdpr-art-5-17-18-21-data-minimization.requirements: The organization has implemented a process for granting and removing users' access to personal data.

gdpr-art-5-retention-timelines.requirements: The organization identifies and defines timelines for retaining personal data as per legal and contractual requirements.

gdpr-art-32-insights-data-aggregation.requirements: The organization ensures insights generated from personal data using third-party analytics engines are at an aggregated level.

gdpr-art-15-anonymization.requirements: The organization anonymizes and de-identifies personal data attributes wherever possible.

gdpr-art-15-access.requirements: The organization has mechanisms to let data subjects access their data.

gdpr-art-5-16-19-accuracy-update.requirements: The organization allows data subjects to update their data and keep it accurate.

gdpr-art-17-deletion-restriction-etc.control: Deletion, Restriction, Notification, Portability, Objection, Automated Decision-Making
gdpr-art-17-deletion-restriction-etc.requirements: The organization allows data subjects to delete or restrict data processing, ensures portability, objection rights, and limits automated processing.

gdpr-art-24-responsibility-accountabilit.requirements: The organization documents responsibilities of privacy and security roles.

gdpr-art-24-data-protection-policy.requirements: The organization maintains a data protection policy to ensure compliance with data protection laws.

gdpr-art-24-training-awareness.requirements: The organization provides periodic training and awareness programs for employees on data protection and privacy requirements.

gdpr-art-24-monitoring-review.requirements: The organization conducts regular monitoring and reviews of its data protection measures and policies to ensure ongoing compliance and effectiveness.

gdpr-art-25-data-protection-by-design.requirements: The organization implements data protection principles in the design and operation of its systems and processes.

gdpr-art-25-data-protection-by-default.requirements: The organization ensures that, by default, only personal data necessary for each specific purpose of the processing is processed.

gdpr-art-27-representative.requirements: The organization appoints a representative in the EU for compliance with GDPR requirements when not established in the EU.

gdpr-art-28-processor-contracts.requirements: The organization ensures that contracts with data processors include clauses requiring the processor to comply with data protection regulations.

gdpr-art-28-data-processing-agreement.requirements: The organization executes Data Processing Agreements with all third parties that may have access to personal data processed by the application.

gdpr-art-28-third-party-integration.requirements: The organization integrates with third-party service providers in a manner that exposes only minimal requisite personal data attributes to these third parties.

gdpr-art-29-37-appointment-of-dpo.requirements: The organization appoints a Data Protection Officer (DPO) to oversee GDPR compliance.

gdpr-art-29-position-role-of-dpo.requirements: The organization ensures that the DPO's position and role are properly defined and communicated.

gdpr-art-29-38-independence-of-dpo.requirements: The organization ensures that the DPO operates independently and reports directly to the highest management level.

gdpr-art-29-resources-support-for-dpo.requirements: The organization provides adequate resources, training, and support for the DPO to carry out their tasks effectively.

gdpr-art-29-expertise-of-dpo.requirements: The organization ensures that the DPO has the necessary expertise/professional competence in data protection law and practices.

gdpr-art-30-records-of-processing-activi.requirements: The organization maintains records of processing activities (ROPA), including the purposes of processing, categories of data subjects and personal data, and recipients of personal data.

gdpr-art-31-cooperation-with-authorities.requirements: The organization cooperates with data protection authorities in the performance of their tasks, providing necessary information and access to data processing activities.

gdpr-art-32-access-restriction.requirements: The organization restricts access to personal data processed only to authorized personnel.

gdpr-art-32-product-version.requirements: The organization releases security updates in a timely manner, upon identification of vulnerabilities, bugs, or security enhancements.

gdpr-art-32-backup.requirements: The organization backs up critical data on a periodic basis.

gdpr-art-32-audit-logging.requirements: The organization enables audit logging on all systems and ensures the same can be extracted for all Products.

gdpr-art-32-web-application-firewall.requirements: The organization has implemented a Web Application firewall to protect the product from malicious attacks.

gdpr-art-32-encryption-at-rest.requirements: The organization protects personal data stored with a secure level of encryption.

gdpr-art-32-encryption-in-transit.requirements: The organization protects all client-server communications with an appropriate level of encryption.

gdpr-art-32-vulnerability-assessment.requirements: The organization subjects systems to periodic Vulnerability Assessments and patches critical vulnerabilities without undue delay.

gdpr-art-32-backend-integration.requirements: The organization protects backend integrations using secure APIs/Web services.

gdpr-art-33-breach-notification-to-custo.requirements: The organization notifies customers of a personal data breach within 48 hours unless the breach is unlikely to result in a risk to rights and freedoms.

gdpr-art-34-breach-notification-to-data-.requirements: The organization communicates a breach to data subjects without undue delay when it likely results in a high risk to their rights and freedoms.

gdpr-art-35-change-management.requirements: The organization ensures changes to processing personal data are subject to prior approval before development.

gdpr-art-35-risk-mitigation.requirements: The organization addresses and mitigates risks identified in Privacy Assessments in a timely manner.

gdpr-art-35-segregation-of-environment.requirements: The organization ensures development, test, and production environments are segregated and access to production is restricted.

gdpr-art-35-testing.requirements: The organization tests only in test environments and does not use production data for testing.

gdpr-art-35-data-protection-impact-asses.requirements: The organization performs DPIAs periodically and addresses medium and high risks in a timely manner.

gdpr-art-36-prior-consultation.requirements: The organization consults supervisory authority before processing if DPIA indicates high risk without mitigation.

gdpr-art-37-dpo-accessibility.requirements: The organization makes the DPO easily accessible to data subjects and authorities.

gdpr-art-44-46-data-transfers-outside-eu.requirements: The organization ensures data transferred outside the EU is protected by appropriate safeguards.

gdpr-art-45-adequacy-decisions.requirements: The organization transfers personal data only to jurisdictions with adequate levels of protection.

gdpr-art-40-42-codes-of-conduct-and-cert.requirements: The organization adheres to approved codes of conduct and certifications to demonstrate GDPR compliance when transferring data.
